title: HELM's deep: Highly Extincted Low-Mass galaxies seen by JWST
comment: 17 pages, 19 figures, accepted for publication in A&A
summary: The dust content of star-forming galaxies is generally positively correlated with their stellar mass. However, some recent JWST studies have shown the existence of a population of dwarf galaxies with an unexpectedly large dust attenuation. Using the Cosmic Evolution Early Release Science Survey (CEERS) data, we identified a sample of 1361 highly extincted low-mass (HELM) galaxies, defined as dwarf galaxies ($M_*<10^{8.5}$) with Av>1mag or more massive galaxies with an exceptionally high dust attenuation given their stellar mass (i.e., $Av>1.6log_{10}(M_*/Mo)-12.6$). The selection is performed using the multiparameter distribution obtained through a comprehensive spectral energy distribution fitting analysis, based on optical to near-infrared data. After excluding possible contaminants, like brown dwarfs, little red dots, high-z (z>8.5) and ultra-high-z (z>15) galaxies, the sample mainly includes sources at z<1, with a tail extending up to z=7.2. The sample has a median stellar mass of $10^7$ Mo and a median dust attenuation of Av=2mag. We analysed the morphology, environment and star-formation rate of these sources to investigate the reason of their large dust attenuation. In particular, HELM sources have sizes (effective radii, Re) similar to non-dusty dwarf galaxies and no correlation is visible between the axis ratios (b/a) and the dust attenuation. This findings indicate that it is unlikely that the large dust attenuation is due to projection effects, but a prolate or a disk-on oblate geometry are still possible, at least for a subsample of the sources. We have found that the distribution of HELM sources is slightly skewed toward more clustered environments than non-dusty dwarfs and tend to be slightly less star forming. This finding, if confirmed by spectroscopic follow-up, indicates that HELM sources could be going through some environmental processes, such as galaxy interactions.

AI.tldr: JWST CEERS巡天发现1361个高消光低质量星系，这些矮星系（M*<10^8.5）具有异常高的尘埃消光（Av>1mag），挑战了星系尘埃含量与恒星质量正相关的传统认知。
AI.motivation: 传统上认为星系尘埃含量与其恒星质量正相关，但最近JWST观测发现存在具有异常高尘埃消光的矮星系群体，这挑战了现有认知，需要深入研究其成因。
AI.method: 使用CEERS巡天数据，通过光学到近红外的光谱能量分布拟合分析，筛选出1361个高消光低质量星系，排除褐矮星、小红点、高红移星系等污染源，分析其形态、环境和恒星形成率。
AI.result: HELM星系中位恒星质量为10^7太阳质量，中位尘埃消光Av=2mag，主要分布在z<1，最高达z=7.2。其大小与非尘埃矮星系相似，轴比与尘埃消光无相关性，表明不是投影效应。它们倾向于分布在更密集的环境中，恒星形成率略低。
AI.conclusion: HELM星系异常高的尘埃消光不太可能是投影效应所致，而可能与星系相互作用等环境过程有关，这需要光谱后续观测来证实。

recommendation.reason: 该论文利用JWST CEERS数据研究高消光低质量星系，涉及尘埃、恒星形成和星系环境，与用户画像中的dust、star-forming galaxies、JWST等主题高度匹配，且作者A. M. Koekemoer在用户核心作者列表中。但论文主要关注矮星系而非强引力透镜，且未涉及高红移星系动力学或运动学，因此评分适中。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题与用户画像中的dust、star-forming galaxies、JWST、dwarf galaxies等关键词高度匹配，但未涉及强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣。
recommendation.method_fit: 方法基于SED拟合和形态分析，与用户常用的强透镜建模方法不同，但数据处理和统计分析具有通用性。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者A. M. Koekemoer出现在用户核心作者列表中，其他作者如A. Renzini也有一定权重，但整体作者重合度不高。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文发现高消光低质量星系群体，挑战传统认知，具有一定新颖性，但与用户核心兴趣的强透镜研究关联较弱。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或运动学等用户核心兴趣领域，且主要关注低红移矮星系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星暴星系中的尘埃含量通常与其恒星质量呈正相关。然而，近期一些JWST研究显示存在一类尘埃消光异常大的矮星系。利用宇宙演化早期释放科学巡天（CEERS）数据，我们识别出1361个高消光低质量（HELM）星系样本，定义为矮星系（$M_*<10^{8.5}$）且$A_V>1$ mag，或更大质量星系中相对于其恒星质量具有异常高尘埃消光的星系（即$A_V>1.6\log_{10}(M_*/M_\odot)-12.6$）。该选择基于通过综合光谱能量分布拟合分析（基于光学至近红外数据）获得的多参数分布。在排除可能的污染源（如褐矮星、小红点、高红移（$z>8.5$）和超高红移（$z>15$）星系）后，样本主要包含$z<1$的源，尾部延伸至$z=7.2$。样本的中值恒星质量为$10^7 M_\odot$，中值尘埃消光为$A_V=2$ mag。我们分析了这些源的形态、环境和恒星形成率，以探究其大尘埃消光的原因。特别是，HELM源的大小（有效半径$R_e$）与非尘埃矮星系相似，且轴比（$b/a$）与尘埃消光之间无相关性。这一发现表明，大尘埃消光不太可能是投影效应所致，但扁长或盘状扁球几何结构仍有可能（至少对部分源而言）。我们发现HELM源的分布略微偏向于比非尘埃矮星系更聚集的环境，且其恒星形成率略低。若经光谱后续观测证实，这一发现表明HELM源可能正在经历某些环境过程，如星系相互作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，HELM星系异常高的尘埃消光不太可能是投影效应所致，而可能与星系相互作用等环境过程有关，这需要光谱后续观测来证实。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the steps considered for the sample selection. 2 2 2 a See eq. 1 ; b matching with the sample by Holwerda2024 ; c matching with the sample by Finkelstein2024 ; d sources that are removed from the HELM sample thanks to spectroscopic data (Sect. C ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：样本选择所考虑步骤的总结。2 2 2 a 见公式1；b 与Holwerda2024样本匹配；c 与Finkelstein2024样本匹配；d 借助光谱数据从HELM样本中移除的源（附录C）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The unexpected population of HELM galaxies, as visible in the stellar mass and dust attenuation plane. Black dots are the entire CEERS sample (before any selection), as derived from the first SED fitting run described in Sec. 2.2 and considering the median value of both Av and stellar mass. Contour lines show the 20 (yellow) to 90% (dark blue) of the distribution, in steps of 10%. Coloured symbols show other samples of dusty objects from the literature ( AlcaldePampliega2019 ; PerezGonzalez2023 ; Gentile2024 ; Rodighiero2023 ; Bisigello2023b ; Gandolfi2025 ; Castellano2025 ; ArrabalHaro2023b ) and the one analysed in this paper (see Sec. 2.3 ). Bisigello2025a is an HELM galaxy confirmed spectroscopically and is also part of the HELM- \(2\sigma\) sample, while the source by Castellano2025 has been confirmed spectroscopically, but it is on another field. The green dashed line shows the known relation between dust attenuation and stellar mass ( McLure2018 ) derived at \(2<z<3\) , while the red solid line shows the selection criterion of HELM sources.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在恒星质量与尘埃消光平面上可见的意外HELM星系群。黑点为整个CEERS样本（任何选择之前），源自第2.2节描述的首次SED拟合运行，并考虑$A_V$和恒星质量的中值。等高线以10%步长显示分布的20%（黄色）至90%（深蓝色）。彩色符号显示文献中其他尘埃天体样本（AlcaldePampliega2019；PerezGonzalez2023；Gentile2024；Rodighiero2023；Bisigello2023b；Gandolfi2025；Castellano2025；ArrabalHaro2023b）以及本文分析的样本（见第2.3节）。Bisigello2025a是经光谱证认的HELM星系，也是HELM-$2\sigma$样本的一部分，而Castellano2025的源已通过光谱证认，但位于另一天区。绿色虚线显示在$2<z<3$处推导的已知尘埃消光与恒星质量关系（McLure2018），红色实线显示HELM源的选择判据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Stellar mass and dust attenuation plane showing the HELM sources and the HELM selection criterion (red solid line). For the stellar mass and dust attenuation we show the median value of the median outputs of each SED setup. We remind that the HELM selection is performed on the multiparameter probability distribution and not on the point estimates of the physical properties, so the median value shown here can be slightly out of the selection if one of the SED runs has a median output distant from the HELM selection. The two side panels show the number density of the HELM samples before and after the selections of Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：恒星质量与尘埃消光平面，显示HELM源和HELM选择判据（红色实线）。对于恒星质量和尘埃消光，我们显示每个SED设置中值输出的中值。我们提醒，HELM选择基于多参数概率分布而非物理属性的点估计，因此若某个SED运行的中值输出远离HELM选择，此处显示的中值可能略微超出选择范围。两侧面板显示表1选择前后HELM样本的数密度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Normalized redshift (top) and stellar mass (bottom) distributions of the HELM samples. Coloured arrows indicate the median of the three samples and are slightly shifted vertically for clarity. In the top panel, we limit the plot to \(z<3.5\) for visual clarity, but we show the entire range in the inset for the HELM- \(1\sigma\) sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：HELM样本的归一化红移（上）和恒星质量（下）分布。彩色箭头指示三个样本的中值，并为了清晰而略微垂直偏移。在上图中，为视觉清晰我们将绘图限制在$z<3.5$，但在插图中显示HELM-$1\sigma$样本的整个范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Fraction of HELM sources, considering all samples, with respect to all galaxies with similar redshift (top) and similar redshift and stellar mass (bottom). We consider only galaxies in the entire CEERS sample with good SED fit (i.e., \(\chi^{2}<20\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：所有样本中HELM源相对于具有相似红移（上）以及相似红移和恒星质量（下）的所有星系的占比。我们仅考虑整个CEERS样本中SED拟合良好（即$\chi^2<20$）的星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the stacked rest-frame photometry of the combined HELM samples (top) and the sample of non-dusty dwarfs (bottom) at different redshifts. Stacked photometry is normalised at \(2.5\,\mu m\) . We show the HELM SED (solid black lines), convolved using a top-hat function over seven data points, in both panels for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：不同红移下合并HELM样本（上）与非尘埃矮星系样本（下）的叠加静止帧测光比较。叠加测光在$2.5\,\mu m$处归一化。我们在两个面板中均显示HELM SED（实黑线），使用顶帽函数在七个数据点上卷积，以便比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Colour-colour F277W-F356W vs. F200W-F277W (top) and F277W-F356W vs. F356W-F444W (bottom) diagram of the HELM samples. The grey shaded area and the black dashed lines are the golden and silver selection criteria for \(z=15-20\) (top) and \(z=20-30\) (bottom) by Castellano2025 . We show only HELM galaxies with \(S/N>3\) in the considered filters. Median errors are reported in the top right of the plot.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：HELM样本的F277W-F356W vs. F200W-F277W（上）和F277W-F356W vs. F356W-F444W（下）颜色-颜色图。灰色阴影区域和黑色虚线分别为Castellano2025对$z=15-20$（上）和$z=20-30$（下）的金色和银色选择判据。我们仅显示在所考虑滤光片中信噪比$S/N>3$的HELM星系。中值误差显示在图的右上角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Colour-magnitude F444W-F277W vs. F444W magnitude (top) and colour-colour F444W-F277W vs. F200W-F115W diagram (bottom) of the HELM samples. The grey shaded area is the LRD selection criteria by Barro2024 and by Greene2024 . We show only HELM galaxies with \(S/N>3\) in the considered filters. The median errors are shown in the top right.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：HELM样本的F444W-F277W vs. F444W星等（上）和F444W-F277W vs. F200W-F115W颜色-颜色图（下）。灰色阴影区域为Barro2024和Greene2024的LRD选择判据。我们仅显示在所考虑滤光片中信噪比$S/N>3$的HELM星系。中值误差显示在右上角。

title: Spin-filament alignments to unravel galaxy evolution and model intrinsic alignments
comment: Submitted to ESO White Papers Expanding Horizons call: what science questions will astronomy need to answer in the 2040s? Cover page plus 3 pages, 1 figure
summary: By the 2040s, several all-sky surveys will have transformed our view of the large-scale structure. However, one of the major outstanding questions in astrophysics will remain: understanding how galaxies acquire and evolve their angular momentum and how this connects to the cosmic web. Measuring the alignments between galaxy spins and cosmic filaments across cosmic time, and understanding what this reveals about galaxy evolution, requires surveys that also characterise intrinsic alignments, i.e. correlations in galaxy shapes produced by the cosmic web itself rather than by lensing. Intrinsic alignments are a major source of systematic error in weak-lensing measurements of the fundamental parameters of the Universe. Addressing both questions together will necessitate new types of MOS surveys that combine kinematic information with high-completeness redshifts down to at least 24-25mag. To achieve our science goals, we require a new generation of wide-field spectroscopic facilities that can obtain spin-filament alignment measurements for millions of galaxies while simultaneously delivering sub-Mpc resolution of the cosmic web and spatially-resolved kinematics required to map the spin-filament connection at the level of individual galaxies within their local cosmic environment. Such a program would provide a unique legacy survey of galaxies and cosmic structures from kiloparsec to megaparsec scales, establishing ESO's leadership in bridging the physics of galaxy evolution with the systematic-control requirements for Stage-IV cosmological surveys.

AI.tldr: 到2040年代，全天巡天将改变我们对大尺度结构的认识，但星系角动量获取与演化以及与宇宙网的联系仍是关键问题。需要结合运动学信息和红移测量的新型多目标光谱巡天，以测量星系自旋与宇宙纤维的排列关系，同时控制弱引力透镜测量中的系统误差。
AI.motivation: 理解星系如何获取和演化其角动量，以及这与宇宙网的联系是当前天体物理学的主要未解问题。同时，内禀排列（星系形状与宇宙网的相关性）是弱引力透镜宇宙学测量的主要系统误差来源，需要同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出新一代宽视场光谱设施，能够获取数百万个星系的旋转-纤维排列测量，同时提供亚兆秒差距分辨率的宇宙网和空间分辨的运动学信息，在单个星系及其局部宇宙环境中绘制旋转-纤维连接。
AI.result: 这样的计划将提供从千秒差距到兆秒差距尺度的星系和宇宙结构的独特遗产巡天，建立ESO在连接星系演化物理与第四阶段宇宙学巡天系统控制需求方面的领导地位。
AI.conclusion: 需要结合运动学信息与高完整性红移（至少24-25星等）的新型多目标光谱巡天，以同时解决星系演化问题和弱引力透镜系统误差控制，这需要新一代宽视场光谱设施来实现。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题涉及星系自旋与宇宙纤维的排列，与用户兴趣中的'lensing'和'cosmic time'有部分匹配，但核心是星系演化与弱引力透镜系统误差，而非用户重点关注的强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学。方法上强调大规模光谱巡天，未涉及强引力透镜技术。作者列表中无用户核心作者。因此评分中等。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配，涉及弱引力透镜系统误差和星系演化，但非强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学核心主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配，主要讨论大规模光谱巡天和运动学测量，未使用强引力透镜方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配，作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等，提出未来巡天计划，但未直接涉及用户关注的高红移星系动力学或强引力透镜新发现。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无负面关键词匹配，但主题偏离用户核心兴趣。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 到2040年代，若干全天巡天将彻底改变我们对大尺度结构的认识。然而，天体物理学中一个主要的未解问题依然存在：理解星系如何获得并演化其角动量，以及这与宇宙网的联系。测量星系自旋与宇宙纤维在宇宙时间尺度上的对齐，并理解这揭示了星系演化的哪些信息，需要同时表征本征对齐（即由宇宙网本身而非引力透镜产生的星系形状相关性）的巡天。本征对齐是弱引力透镜测量宇宙基本参数的主要系统误差来源。同时解决这两个问题将需要新型多目标光谱巡天，这些巡天需结合运动学信息与高完整性红移（至少达到24-25星等）。为实现我们的科学目标，我们需要新一代宽视场光谱设施，能够对数百万个星系进行自旋-纤维对齐测量，同时提供亚兆秒差距分辨率的宇宙网以及空间分辨的运动学，以在单个星系及其局部宇宙环境层面绘制自旋-纤维联系。这样的项目将提供一个从千秒差距到兆秒差距尺度的独特星系和宇宙结构遗产巡天，确立欧洲南方天文台在连接星系演化物理学与第四阶段宇宙学巡天系统误差控制需求方面的领导地位。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：需要结合运动学信息与高完整性红移（至少24-25星等）的新型多目标光谱巡天，以同时解决星系演化问题和弱引力透镜系统误差控制，这需要新一代宽视场光谱设施来实现。

title: The impact of bars on the properties of HII regions in the TIMER survey
summary: In this study we perform a comparative analysis of the properties of the HII regions located in different areas of barred galaxies, with the aim of investigating the impact of bars on the physical properties of the ionised gas. Based on integral field spectroscopy data for 17 barred galaxies covering approximately the central 6x6 kpc, we detect a total of 2200 HII regions, of which 331 are located within the nuclear disc (also known as circumnuclear regions), 661 in the bar region, and 1208 in the disc. Among the physical properties of the HII regions, we explore the O/H and N/O abundances, H$α$ luminosity, dust extinction, electron density, and H$α$ equivalent width. We find clear differences in the properties of the HII regions between the nuclear disc, the bar and the disc, that could be explained by an enhancement in the molecular gas concentration in the central parts driven by bar-induced gas flows. As this gas is channelled towards the galaxy centre, the most extreme values in the analysed properties are found for the circumnuclear HII regions. Unlike the bar strength, galaxy mass does seem to affect the properties of the HII regions, with massive galaxies presenting higher values in most of the properties, possibly due to the increased amount of gas in these systems. This study provides evidence that the bar-driven redistribution of material within the galaxy inner parts causes significant differences in the HII region properties depending on their location within the galaxies.

AI.tldr: 对17个棒旋星系中HII区域的比较分析显示，核盘、棒和盘区域的HII区域物理性质存在显著差异，这些差异主要由棒诱导的气体流动导致的气体再分布引起。
AI.motivation: 研究棒旋星系中不同区域（核盘、棒、盘）HII区域的物理性质差异，探究棒结构对电离气体性质的影响。
AI.method: 使用积分场光谱数据对17个棒旋星系进行分析，覆盖中心约6×6 kpc区域，共检测2200个HII区域，其中331个位于核盘（环核区域），661个位于棒区域，1208个位于盘区域。分析O/H和N/O丰度、Hα光度、尘埃消光、电子密度和Hα等效宽度等物理性质。
AI.result: 发现核盘、棒和盘区域的HII区域性质存在明显差异，环核HII区域表现出最极端的性质值。棒强度对HII区域性质影响不大，但星系质量有显著影响，大质量星系在大多数性质上表现出更高值。这些差异可解释为棒诱导的气体流动导致分子气体在中心区域富集。
AI.conclusion: 棒驱动的星系内部物质再分布导致HII区域性质随其在星系中的位置不同而产生显著差异，棒诱导的气体流动是造成这些差异的主要机制。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究棒旋星系中HII区域的物理性质，属于近邻星系天体物理学，与用户主要关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振及多相气体等方向不直接相关。虽然涉及分子气体和尘埃等关键词，但研究主题和方法与用户的核心兴趣领域差异较大，且无核心作者匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们对棒旋星系不同区域中的HII区域性质进行了比较分析，旨在探究棒结构对电离气体物理性质的影响。基于17个棒旋星系的积分场光谱数据（覆盖约中心6×6千秒差距），我们共探测到2200个HII区域，其中331个位于核盘（也称为环核区域），661个位于棒区域，1208个位于盘区域。在HII区域的物理性质中，我们研究了O/H和N/O丰度、Hα光度、尘埃消光、电子密度以及Hα等效宽度。我们发现核盘、棒和盘区域的HII区域性质存在明显差异，这可以通过棒驱动的气体流导致中心区域分子气体浓度增强来解释。随着气体向星系中心输送，环核HII区域在分析的性质中表现出最极端的值。与棒强度不同，星系质量似乎确实影响HII区域的性质，大质量星系在大多数性质上呈现更高的值，这可能是由于这些系统中气体含量增加所致。本研究提供了证据表明，棒驱动的星系内部物质再分布导致HII区域性质随其在星系中的位置不同而产生显著差异。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，棒驱动的星系内部物质再分布导致HII区域性质随其在星系中的位置不同而产生显著差异，棒诱导的气体流动是造成这些差异的主要机制。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Main properties of the galaxy sample. These include: galaxy designation (column 1), morphological classification (column 2), galaxy distance (column 3), stellar mass (column 4), position angle and ellipticity of the disc (columns 5 and 6), position angle, ellipticity and semi-major axis of the bar (columns 7-9), bar strength (column 10), and kinematic radius for the nuclear disc (column 11).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：星系样本的主要性质。这些包括：星系名称（第1列），形态分类（第2列），星系距离（第3列），恒星质量（第4列），盘的位置角和椭圆率（第5和第6列），棒的位置角、椭圆率和半长轴（第7-9列），棒强度（第10列），以及核盘的运动学半径（第11列）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Modelling of the H ii regions by PYHIIEXTRACTOR for the galaxy NGC 4981. We show the observed H \(\alpha\) map (top panel), the derived model of the candidate H ii regions and the DIG together (middle-top panel) and separately (H ii regions, middle-bottom panel; DIG, bottom panel). Orange circle and red ellipse in top panel delimit the nuclear disc and bar regions, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：PYHIIEXTRACTOR对星系NGC 4981的H ii区域的建模。我们展示了观测到的H \(\alpha\) 图（上方面板），候选H ii区域和DIG的联合模型（中上方面板）以及分别展示的模型（H ii区域，中下方面板；DIG，下方面板）。上方面板中的橙色圆圈和红色椭圆分别标定了核盘和棒区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Sketch of a barred galaxy where the different populations of H ii regions are identified (circumnuclear, pink; bar, orange; inner disc, purple; outer disc, grey). The three contours correspond to the limits of the nuclear disc (dashed pink circle), bar region (dotted orange ellipse), and inner disc (dashed-dotted green ellipse), respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：一个棒旋星系的示意图，其中标明了不同群体的H ii区域（环核区域，粉色；棒区域，橙色；内盘，紫色；外盘，灰色）。三个等高线分别对应核盘（粉色虚线圆圈）、棒区域（橙色虚线椭圆）和内盘（绿色点划线椭圆）的边界。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of the distributions of oxygen abundances ( top ), N/O abundances ( middle ), and L(H \(\alpha\) ) ( bottom ) for different populations of H ii regions: disc (green) versus bar (orange) regions ( left ), disc (green) versus circumnuclear (pink) regions ( middle ), and regions in the disc inside (purple) versus outside (grey) the bar radius ( right ). The distribution for the bar regions is also represented in right panels with unfilled black histograms. In the top left corner of first panels we include the typical (median) errorbar of each parameter, derived by propagating the errors in the involved emission line intensities (the intrinsic error in the used calibrations is not included for O/H and N/O abundances). In the bottom right corner of the panels the Mann-Whitney U test p-value for each pair of compared distributions is shown, and for those which have values below 5% (i.e. presenting statistically significant differences), the Cliff’s \(\delta\) is also provided as a measure of the magnitude of the differences. These are categorised as negligible (N), small (S), medium (M) and large (L) differences (see Sec. 4 for details on these statistics).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同H ii区域群体的氧丰度（上方面板）、N/O丰度（中间面板）和L(H \(\alpha\) )（下方面板）分布的比较：盘（绿色）与棒（橙色）区域（左方面板），盘（绿色）与环核（粉色）区域（中间面板），以及棒半径内（紫色）与外（灰色）的盘区域（右方面板）。右方面板中也用未填充的黑色直方图表示棒区域的分布。在第一个面板的左上角，我们包含了每个参数的典型（中位数）误差棒，该误差棒通过传播所涉及发射线强度的误差得出（O/H和N/O丰度未包含所用校准的内在误差）。在面板的右下角，显示了每对比较分布的Mann-Whitney U检验p值，对于p值低于5%（即存在统计显著差异）的情况，还提供了Cliff’s \(\delta\) 作为差异大小的度量。这些差异被分类为可忽略（N）、小（S）、中（M）和大（L）（详见第4节关于这些统计量的说明）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Same as Fig. 3 but for the dust extinction ( top ), the \([\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6717/[\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6731\) line ratio as a proxy for the electron density ( middle ), and the H \(\alpha\) equivalent width ( bottom ). See caption above for more details.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对尘埃消光（上方面板）、作为电子密度代理的\([\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6717/[\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6731\) 线比（中间面板）和H \(\alpha\) 等效宽度（下方面板）。更多细节请参见上图说明。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Resolved \(\Sigma_{\star}-{O/H}\) ( top ) and \(\Sigma_{\star}-{N/O}\) ( bottom ) relations. H ii regions have been segregated as in Fig. 3 , following Sec. 3.3 . Solid and dashed lines mark the median trend and the median absolute deviation, respectively, in bins of 0.4 log \(\Sigma_{\star}\) . The average absolute difference of the median trend between the two represented distributions (| \(\Delta\) |) is given in the bottom right corner of the panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：分辨的\(\Sigma_{\star}-{O/H}\) （上方面板）和\(\Sigma_{\star}-{N/O}\) （下方面板）关系。H ii区域已按图3所示方式分组，遵循第3.3节。实线和虚线分别表示在0.4 log \(\Sigma_{\star}\) 的区间内的中位数趋势和中位数绝对偏差。两个表示分布的中位数趋势之间的平均绝对差（| \(\Delta\) |）在面板的右下角给出。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Mann-Whitney U test p-values and Cliff’s \(\delta\) values for the analysed properties of the compared subpopulations of H ii regions (circumnuclear, bar, and disc) when segregating the sample according to the galaxy mass and the bar strength.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：根据星系质量和棒强度对样本进行分组时，比较的H ii区域子群体（环核、棒和盘）的分析性质的Mann-Whitney U检验p值和Cliff’s \(\delta\) 值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Cliff’s \(\delta\) values for the analysed properties of the compared subpopulations of H ii regions with no decontamination from DIG emission (golden down triangles). The values for the analysis with DIG correction (described in Sec. 4 ) are shown for reference (brown up triangles). Only the cases where Mann-Whitney U p-values \(<5\%\) are considered.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：未进行DIG发射去污染的比较H ii区域子群体的分析性质的Cliff’s \(\delta\) 值（金色向下三角形）。带有DIG校正的分析值（如第4节所述）作为参考显示（棕色向上三角形）。仅考虑Mann-Whitney U p值\(<5\%\) 的情况。
